info.title: ignoring invalid argument --help
info.description:
info:Added font search path /usr/share/fonts/truetype
info:Loading fonts for Linux platform
Ibex 6.11.2.4 Pro running...
Ibex 6.11.2.4 commands:
to create a PDF from an FO file
ibex fo-file pdf-file
to create a PDF from XML and XSL files
ibex -xsl xsl-file xml-file pdf-file
to create a FO from XML and XSL files
ibex -transform  xml-file xsl-file fo-file [param=val] [param=val]
Other options
-fonts [pattern]             to list all available fonts
or all those containing 'pattern'
-baseuri uri                 set Settings.BaseURI_XML
-baseuri-xml uri             set Settings.BaseURI_XML
-baseuri-xsl uri             set Settings.BaseURI_XSL
-level [info|warning|severe] set logging level
-logfile                     log errors to named file
-disable-bidi                disable Unicode BIDI algorithm
to improve speed
-webtimeout [value]          set Settings.WebRequestTimeout (ms)

options.name: -fonts
options.description:
to list all available fonts
or all those containing 'pattern'

options.name: -disable-bidi
options.description:
disable Unicode BIDI algorithm
to improve speed
